question: [File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/parser/record/transactionhandler/ConsensusCreateTopicTransactionHandler.java -> Scope: '] [Function: createTopic()] Can an unprivileged external user submit a ConsensusCreateTopic transaction with a malformed protobuf submitKey that passes hasSubmitKey() but produces corrupt bytes via toByteArray(), causing the stored submitKey to be undeserializable, silently corrupting topic access control data in the mirror node?
